zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Abernethy 7th Abernethy of Saltoun於1385年出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾武坡 堂 本 薩爾圖時，他的父親William Abernethy 6th Laird of Saltoun11382歲，母親Mary Stewart19歲。他於1402年與Margaret William Borthwick of Borthwick在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1411年7月24日在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾音巴盧利享年26歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾音巴盧利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Abernethy 7th Abernethy of Saltoun于1385年出生在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾武坡 堂 本 薩爾圖时，他的父亲William Abernethy 6th Laird of Saltoun11382岁，母亲Mary Stewart19岁。他于1402年与Margaret William Borthwick of Borthwick在英国苏格兰米德洛迪安结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1411年7月24日在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾音巴盧利享年26岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾音巴盧利。

nameMeanings.name: Abernethy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Abernathy
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Abernethy in southeastern Perthshire. The placename is of Pictish origin, meaning ‘mouth of the river Nethy’.

History: This was the name of a cadet branch of MacDuff earls of Fife and one of the surnames of the Scots who settled in northern Ireland during the ‘plantation’ in the 17th century, and it was brought to the US as the name of a Southern plantation owner (in a different sense of the word ‘plantation’).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Abernethy 7th Abernethy of Saltoun was born in 1385, in Upper Town of Saltoun, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, his father, William Abernethy 6th Laird of Saltoun, was 11382 and his mother, Mary Stewart, was 19. He married Margaret William Borthwick of Borthwick in 1402, in Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 24 July 1411, in Inverurie, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 26, and was buried in Inverurie, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Abernethy 7th Abernethy of Saltoun est né en 1385, à Upper Town of Saltoun, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, son père, William Abernethy 6th Laird of Saltoun, avait 11382 ans et sa mère, Mary Stewart, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Margaret William Borthwick of Borthwick en 1402, à Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 24 juillet 1411, à Inverurie, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 26 ans, et a été enterré à Inverurie, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Abernethy 7th Abernethy of Saltoun 1385 in Upper Town of Saltoun, Haddingtonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Abernethy 6th Laird of Saltoun 11382 und seine Mutter Mary Stewart 19. Er hat 1402 in Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom Margaret William Borthwick of Borthwick geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 24. Juli 1411 im Alter von 26 Jahren in Inverurie, Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Inverurie, Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Abernethy 7th Abernethy of Saltounが1385年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアウップエル トウン オフ サルトウンで生まれた時，父William Abernethy 6th Laird of Saltounは11382歳，母Mary Stewartは19歳であった。1402年にイギリススコットランドミドロスアンでMargaret William Borthwick of Borthwickと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1411年7月24日にイギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアインバーウリーで26歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアインバーウリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Abernethy 7th Abernethy of Saltoun(이)가 1385년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 업퍼 타운 프 살토우에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Abernethy 6th Laird of Saltoun(은)는 11382세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Stewart(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1402년 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언에서 Margaret William Borthwick of Borthwick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1411년 7월 24일 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르 인베루리에서 26세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르 인베루리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Abernethy 7th Abernethy of Saltoun nasceu em 1385, em Upper Town of Saltoun, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, seu pai, William Abernethy 6th Laird of Saltoun, tinha 11382 anos e sua mãe, Mary Stewart, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret William Borthwick of Borthwick em 1402, em Midlothian, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 24 de julho de 1411, em Inverurie, Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 26 anos, e foi sepultado em Inverurie, Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Abernethy 7th Abernethy of Saltoun родился в 1385 г. в местности уппир тоун оф салтоун, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени William Abernethy 6th Laird of Saltoun было 11382 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Stewart, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret William Borthwick of Borthwick в 1402 г. в местности мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 24 июля 1411 г. в местности инвирури, абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 26 лет и был похоронен в местности инвирури, абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Margaret William Borthwick of Borthwick en 1402, en Midlothian, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 24 de julio de 1411, en Inverurie, Aberdeenshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 26 años, y fue sepultado en Inverurie, Aberdeenshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
